subject: WM-0097 review: verified
body: No blocking findings; verified WM-0085 through WM-0096 are done/reviewed/integrated, WM-0097 keeps M7 unstarted, records Roadmap-authoritative M6/M7/M8 scope, preserves Web demo-only and bounded unsigned Windows controlled-external-test verdicts, records required evidence/checks including isolated bench rerun and earlier concurrent bench failure, and keeps later owner gates intact.
